exercises.title: Toric Code Constructor
exercises.description: Build a complete toric code data structure.
tasks: Create edge indexing scheme (row, col, h/v)
Generate all vertex stabilizers with periodic boundaries
hints: Use modular arithmetic for periodic boundaries
Each vertex touches 4 edges (2 horizontal, 2 vertical)
Each plaquette has 4 edges around it
Product of all vertex stabs = I (one constraint)

exercises.title: Logical Operator Generator
exercises.description: Generate and verify all four logical operators.
tasks: Create Z₁ (horizontal loop) and X₁ (vertical path)
Create Z₂ (vertical loop) and X₂ (horizontal path)
Verify X₁ commutes with Z₂ and X₂ commutes with Z₁
exercises.expectedOutput: Verified logical operators for both qubits

exercises.title: Toric Code Syndrome Calculator
exercises.description: Compute syndromes for error patterns on the torus.
tasks: Apply random X and Z errors
Verify syndrome defects come in pairs
hints: Syndrome at vertex = XOR of Z errors on adjacent edges
Syndrome at plaquette = XOR of X errors around face
Periodic: edge at col L-1 wraps to col 0
Total syndrome parity must be even

exercises.title: Toric Code Decoder
exercises.description: Implement minimum weight perfect matching for torus.
tasks: Build syndrome graph with periodic distances
Compare correction success rates vs planar
hints: Distance wraps: min(d, L-d) for periodic
Use networkx for MWPM if available
Logical error if correction XOR error = non-trivial loop
Need to check both X and Z sectors
